claimText: The Draft Seeds Bill 2025 mandates the registration of every seed variety before it can be traded.
evidenceExcerpt: Draft Seeds Bill 2025 mandates registration for every seed variety before trade and incorporates biotech norms.
examUse: Statement-based question on the provisions of the Draft Seeds Bill 2025.
distractorHooks: Exempts commercial seed varieties from registration

claimText: Under the Draft Seeds Bill 2025, farmers are allowed to save, use, exchange, or sell their seeds without brand registration, provided they do not sell them under a brand name.
evidenceExcerpt: Farmers can save, use, exchange, or sell their seeds without brand registration, but cannot sell under a brand name.
examUse: Statement-based question on farmers' rights regarding seed exchange and sale.
distractorHooks: Farmers are completely prohibited from selling seeds
Farmers can sell seeds under their own brand name without registration

claimText: In India's seed sector, Foundation Seed is the progeny of Breeder Seed, and Certified Seed is the progeny of Foundation Seed.
evidenceExcerpt: Breeder Seed is the progeny of the nucleus seed; Foundation Seed is the progeny of breeder seed; Certified Seed is the progeny of foundation seed.
examUse: Correct-pair or chronological sequence question on seed generations.
distractorHooks: Breeder seed is the progeny of foundation seed
Certified seed is the direct progeny of nucleus seed

claimText: Landraces are genetically diverse crop populations that have evolved through traditional farming practices.
evidenceExcerpt: Landraces (genetically diverse crop populations evolved with traditional practices)
examUse: Definition-based question on agricultural biodiversity and traditional crops.
distractorHooks: Genetically modified crops developed in laboratories

claimText: The Seed Village Programme (Beej Gram Yojana) is designed to improve the quality of seeds saved by farmers.
evidenceExcerpt: Seed Village Programme (Beej Gram Yojana) aims to improve farmers' saved seed quality.
examUse: Statement-based question on the objectives of agricultural schemes.
distractorHooks: Aims to replace all farmer-saved seeds with corporate GM seeds
Focuses exclusively on exporting seeds to foreign markets
